data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a full audit trail for merges, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or records that confirm the existence of an audit trail detailing who merged what and why, indicating a clear gap in the implementation. The absence of any relevant evidence directly supporting this requirement leads to the conclusion that it is not met.
gaps: No evidence of a full audit of who merged what and why.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for merge audit trail
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of a full audit trail for merges.
